# clang trunk: assertion "Too many bits for int64_t" in APSInt::getExtValue during constant eval of array subscript with huge fuzzer index

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173686
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer, regression:20
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-27T00:18:55Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/oa7MccYrG

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

```console
clang: /root/llvm-project/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/APSInt.h:100: int64_t llvm::APSInt::getExtValue() const: Assertion `isRepresentableByInt64() && "Too many bits for int64_t"' failed.
```

### Comment 3 - shafik

> Greetings [@Theaamadu](https://github.com/Theaamadu), I am interested to work on the issue. Can you please assign it to me. Thankyou.

I see that you have asked to work on several bugs. If this is your first time contributing to LLVM then I would advise you pick one bug and attempt to make some progress on that bug. Once you have landed a few fixes you can starting thinking about tackling more than one at a time.

### Comment 5 - shafik
